task.zh: 超级实验！抛50次硬币！用快速抛功能看看大数定律有多神奇！
task.en: Super experiment! Flip 50 times! Use quick-flip to see the Law of Large Numbers!

question.zh: 50次实验后，正面的比例是多少？和10次的时候比，更接近50%了吗？
question.en: After 50 flips, what's the heads ratio? Closer to 50% than after 10?

hints.zh: 用'快速抛'按钮可以一次抛10个！
hints.en: Use the 'Quick Flip' button to flip 10 at once!

hints.zh: 随着次数增加，柱状图会越来越平
hints.en: As flips increase, the bars will get more even
